expectations.text: Identifies unpinned base image (ubuntu:latest) as a security issue
expectations.evidence: Issue 1: 'Unpinned Base Image Tag (FROM ubuntu:latest)' - Severity High

expectations.text: Identifies SSH PasswordAuthentication yes as a security risk
expectations.evidence: Issue 3: 'Password Authentication Enabled for SSH' - Severity High

expectations.text: Identifies curl|bash without checksum verification as unsafe
expectations.evidence: Issue 4: 'Piping Curl Output Directly to Bash' - Severity Critical, mentions no integrity verification

expectations.text: Identifies running as root as a security issue
expectations.evidence: Issue 5: 'Running as Root' - Severity High, notes no USER directive

expectations.text: Provides a hardened version of the Dockerfile with fixes applied
expectations.evidence: Complete hardened Dockerfile provided with pinned version, non-root user, sha256 verification

expectations.text: Recommends pinning tool versions instead of using latest
expectations.evidence: Hardened version uses 'v1.2.3' pinned version with SHA-256 checksum
